# Workflow Blueprints
> Multi-primitive workflow compositions for AI agents on Sutrena. Executable playbooks that combine pages, forms, dashboards, webhooks, analytics, entries, and folders.

## What This Is

A collection of workflow blueprints and design themes for Sutrena, a web runtime designed for AI agents. Includes 8 multi-primitive workflows and 10 beautiful form themes.

## 8 Workflows

| Workflow | Primitives | Use Case |
| status-page | page + form + entries + webhook | Public status page with incident reporting and team notifications |
| changelog | page + form + entries + dashboard | Public changelog with release notes and velocity metrics |
| launch-kit | page + form + dashboard + analytics | Complete product launch: landing page, waitlist, growth dashboard, analytics |
| feedback-wall | page + form + entries | Public testimonial wall with auto-publishing feedback |
| hiring-pipeline | form + dashboard + webhook | Job application form with interactive triage dashboard |
| customer-research | folder + 3 forms + dashboard | Organized research suite: NPS, feature priority, interviews |
| personal-crm | form + dashboard + webhook + analytics | Lightweight CRM with deal pipeline and stage management |
| community-board | page + form + entries + dashboard | Public community board with engagement metrics |

## 10 Design Themes

| Slug | Style | Category | HTML |
| minimal-contact | Clean whitespace, hairline borders, system fonts | contact | themes/minimal-contact/index.html |
| gradient-survey | Soft gradient mesh, warm sunset tones | survey | themes/gradient-survey/index.html |
| elegant-rsvp | Dark navy, gold accents, invitation style | rsvp | themes/elegant-rsvp/index.html |
| glassmorphism-feedback | Frosted glass on gradient, CSS star rating | feedback | themes/glassmorphism-feedback/index.html |
| neo-brutalist-waitlist | Bold borders, chunky type, bright yellow | waitlist | themes/neo-brutalist-waitlist/index.html |
| screentime-survey | Anonymous multi-step poll, dark theme | survey | themes/screentime-survey/index.html |
| neumorphism-booking | Soft shadows, pressed inputs, clean UI | booking | themes/neumorphism-booking/index.html |
| clean-order | Professional, trust-building, blue accents | order | themes/clean-order/index.html |
| darkmode-bugreport | Developer dark theme, monospace, red accents | bug-report | themes/darkmode-bugreport/index.html |
| retro-newsletter | Terminal aesthetic, monospace, dashed borders | newsletter | themes/retro-newsletter/index.html |

## Using with Sutrena API

Each template has a meta.json with Sutrena field definitions and a formId. To deploy as a hosted form:

1. Get a key: POST https://sutrena.com/api/trial (no signup)
2. Create a form: POST https://sutrena.com/api/forms with templateId or custom fields from meta.json
3. Share the URL: https://sutrena.com/f/FORM_ID

Base URL for all Sutrena links: https://sutrena.com
- Form URL: https://sutrena.com/f/{formId}
- Dashboard URL: https://sutrena.com/d/{dashboardId}
- Submit endpoint: https://sutrena.com/api/forms/{formId}/submit (no auth required, CORS enabled)

## Sutrena: 7 Primitives

1. **Pages** — Static HTML pages with optional entry templates
2. **Forms** — Data collection with 12 field types and lifecycle controls
3. **Dashboards** — Live data visualization with 7 widget types and 4 data sources
4. **Webhooks** — Real-time notifications to 5 platforms (Slack, Discord, Telegram, Teams, Google Chat)
5. **Analytics** — Privacy-first web analytics with 3 query primitives
6. **Entries** — Dynamic content injection into pages via templates
7. **Folders** — Organizational containers for resources

## Using with Sutrena MCP (63 Tools)

If the agent has MCP access, use these tools directly. Organized by category:

**Forms (7 tools):** sutrena_create_form, sutrena_create_from_template, sutrena_update_form, sutrena_delete_form, sutrena_duplicate_form, sutrena_list_forms, sutrena_get_form

**Submissions (6 tools):** sutrena_get_submissions, sutrena_search_submissions, sutrena_upsert_submission, sutrena_update_submission, sutrena_delete_submissions, sutrena_export_csv

**Dashboards (5 tools):** sutrena_create_dashboard, sutrena_get_dashboard, sutrena_update_dashboard, sutrena_delete_dashboard, sutrena_upload_dashboard_data

**Webhooks (7 tools):** sutrena_create_webhook, sutrena_list_webhooks, sutrena_get_webhook, sutrena_update_webhook, sutrena_delete_webhook, sutrena_test_webhook, sutrena_get_webhook_deliveries

**Pages (6 tools):** sutrena_create_page, sutrena_list_pages, sutrena_get_page, sutrena_update_page, sutrena_delete_page, sutrena_manage_page_entries

**Page Assets (4 tools):** sutrena_upload_page_asset, sutrena_upload_page_assets_batch, sutrena_list_page_assets, sutrena_delete_page_asset

**Site Deployment (2 tools):** sutrena_deploy_site, sutrena_deploy_site_process

**Subdomains (4 tools):** sutrena_set_subdomain, sutrena_get_subdomain, sutrena_list_subdomains, sutrena_create_subdomain, sutrena_delete_subdomain

**Custom Domains (4 tools):** sutrena_add_custom_domain, sutrena_list_custom_domains, sutrena_update_custom_domain, sutrena_delete_custom_domain

**Analytics (7 tools):** sutrena_create_analytics_site, sutrena_list_analytics_sites, sutrena_delete_analytics_site, sutrena_track_event, sutrena_analytics_query, sutrena_analytics_funnel, sutrena_analytics_retention

**Folders (5 tools):** sutrena_create_folder, sutrena_list_folders, sutrena_update_folder, sutrena_delete_folder, sutrena_organize_folder

**Account (3 tools):** sutrena_check_usage, sutrena_get_account, sutrena_submit_feedback

MCP endpoint: https://sutrena.com/api/mcp (Bearer token auth)

## Sutrena Built-in Presets (14)

| Preset | Use case | One-liner |
| contact | Business contact form | `{"templateId": "contact", "createDashboard": true}` |
| feedback | Product feedback with ratings | `{"templateId": "feedback", "createDashboard": true}` |
| bug-report | Bug tracking with severity | `{"templateId": "bug-report", "createDashboard": true}` |
| waitlist | Launch waitlist | `{"templateId": "waitlist", "createDashboard": true}` |
| survey | Customer satisfaction | `{"templateId": "survey", "createDashboard": true}` |
| poll | Quick voting / polls | `{"templateId": "poll", "createDashboard": true}` |
| rsvp | Event registration | `{"templateId": "rsvp", "createDashboard": true, "maxSubmissions": 50}` |
| nps | Net Promoter Score | `{"templateId": "nps", "createDashboard": true, "uniqueBy": ["email"]}` |
| quiz | Quizzes and assessments | `{"templateId": "quiz", "createDashboard": true}` |
| newsletter | Email signups | `{"templateId": "newsletter", "createDashboard": true, "uniqueBy": ["email"]}` |
| booking | Appointment scheduling | `{"templateId": "booking", "createDashboard": true}` |
| client-intake | Client onboarding forms | `{"templateId": "client-intake", "createDashboard": true}` |
| order | Order forms for shops | `{"templateId": "order", "createDashboard": true}` |
| preorder | Limited drops and pre-orders | `{"templateId": "preorder", "createDashboard": true, "maxSubmissions": 100}` |

## Custom Forms

12 field types: text, email, textarea, number, select, multiselect, checkbox, url, tel, date, hidden, file

## Dashboard Widget Types (7)

1. metric_card — Single number (count, sum, avg, min, max)
2. data_table — Table of rows with columns
3. text_block — Static text/notes
4. pie_chart — Distribution by field value
5. bar_chart — Grouped counts or time series
6. line_chart — Trend over time
7. action_table — Interactive table with inline editable dropdowns (requires formId, private only)

## Dashboard Data Sources (4)

1. Form submissions (formId) — live form data
2. Inline JSON (data array, max 1000 rows) — static data
3. CSV (csvObjectId, max 10MB/100K rows) — uploaded files
4. Analytics sites (analyticsSiteId) — web analytics events

## Plans & Limits

| Plan | Price | Projects | Submissions/Form | Events/mo | Webhooks | Domains | Storage |
| Free | $0 | 10 | 500 | 10K | 1 | 0 | 50 MB |
| Builder | $9/mo | 50 | 5,000 | 100K | 5 | 1 | 500 MB |
| Pro | $29/mo | 200 | Unlimited | 1M | 10 | 5 | 5 GB |
| Scale | $79/mo | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited | Unlimited |

Projects = forms + pages + dashboards + analytics sites (single pool)

## Links

- Workflow gallery: https://sutrena.com/workflows
- Full docs: https://sutrena.com/llms-full.txt
- API schema: https://sutrena.com/api/schema
- OpenAPI spec: https://sutrena.com/api/openapi.json
- MCP discovery: https://sutrena.com/.well-known/mcp.json
- Agent playbook: AGENTS.md in this repo
